timeline.body:

Start Free
Test Your Idea
Before You Build

Got an idea in your head? We help you validate it before spending time and money.

Start Free Trial
Watch Demo
24+ AI Agents
Virtual Society
87%
Accuracy Rate
< 5min
Results Time
MEASURABLE PROOF
Not Just Another LLM Chat

These KPIs are designed to show tangible value from simulation reasoning, evidence grounding, and risk discovery.

POINTS
+18
Reasoning Score

Higher structured reasoning quality vs plain LLM usage.

EVIDENCE-BACKED
72%
Evidence-backed insights

Most conclusions are tied to verifiable evidence cards.

FATAL RISKS
+42%
Critical risk coverage

Find severe failure conditions before spending money.

Pilot results: 20 sessions, Jan 2026
Compared against a baseline LLM prompt

35%

Faster decision time

94%

Session completion rate

4.6/5

Avg helpfulness rating

-30%

Unsupported claims

Why these metrics matter

Idea Court: prosecution, defense, and verdict before decisions

Multi-source research, summarization, and location-aware POIs

Live metrics to track momentum, confidence, and risks

THE PROBLEM
Why Most Ideas Fail

Generic chatbot replies are not real validation. You need diverse, realistic perspectives.

No real market feedback

People often hear what they want, not what the market will actually do.

Fear of embarrassment

Testing in public can be risky before the idea is mature.

No diverse perspectives

You need skeptics, optimists, and pragmatists, not one voice.

The Solution
Meet ASSET

AI Social Simulation & Evolution Tool

Test ideas in a virtual environment first, then iterate safely.

Accepted
Rejected
Neutral
Nodes: 25 • Connections: 50
NODE 13 - NEUTRAL
I am not convinced yet.
HOW IT WORKS
Watch AI Agents Test Your Idea

A virtual society of AI agents with different backgrounds and personalities.

1
Real Personalities

Different roles and mindsets for balanced evaluation.

2
Psychological Traits

Different optimism, skepticism, and risk tolerance.

3
Live Debates

Agents discuss and influence each other in real time.

4
Real Data Grounding

Web-grounded context when available.

FEATURES
Everything You Need

Powerful tools to validate your ideas with confidence.

Instant Results

Fast feedback loop.

Acceptance Rate

See likely audience response.

Polarization Index

Measure disagreement and alignment.

Deep Analysis

Strengths, risks, and suggestions.

Global Markets

Explore different regions and contexts.

Real-Time Thinking

Track opinion shifts over time.
